fixes_applied.description: S011 split into S011a (30s) and S011b (20s)
S022 duration_seconds standardized to 40 (timecode 10:20-11:00). Notes corrected from 10秒 to 40秒.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 夜明け前の霧の中、廃墟となった島の全景。高層コンクリートビルが海に囲まれて立ち並ぶ。超広角。暗く、静謐。
scenes.visual_description_en: Full silhouette of ruined island in pre-dawn mist. Concrete tower blocks surrounded by sea. Extreme wide. Dark and still.
scenes.notes: FIX-H1: stock real photography preferred for establishing shot. stock_search_required=true.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 崩れたコンクリートの廊下。錆びた手すり。窓から差し込む光。かつての生活の痕跡（残された椅子など）。
scenes.visual_description_en: Crumbling concrete corridor. Rusted railing. Light filtering through broken windows. Remnants of daily life — a chair left behind.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 朽ちた木製ドアのクローズアップ。塗装が剥がれ、蔦が這う。テクスチャー重視。コンクリート壁との対比。
scenes.visual_description_en: Close-up of a decayed wooden door. Peeling paint, encroaching vines. Texture-focused. Contrast with concrete wall.
scenes.notes: static: texture shot — motion would distract from decay detail.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 黒背景に「端島」「軍艦島」のテキストがフェードイン。極めてシンプル。ナレーション休止。
scenes.visual_description_en: Title card fade-in on black: '端島' / '軍艦島'. Minimal. Narration pause [PAUSE:2s].
scenes.notes: MOTION_GRAPHICS — animated by compositor. static base; fade handled in timeline.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 明治時代の工業風景。煙突から煙が立ち上る工場群。モノクロ・セピア調のアーカイブ風イメージ。蒸気機関車。港湾。
scenes.visual_description_en: Meiji-era industrial landscape. Smokestacks rising from factory complex. Archival-style monochrome/sepia. Steam locomotive. Harbor.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 長崎港から南西方向へのアニメーションマップ。端島の位置が赤点でハイライト。距離テキスト「約15〜18km」オーバーレイ。
scenes.visual_description_en: Animated map zooming from Nagasaki Port to Hashima Island location. Red dot highlight. Distance overlay '約15〜18km'.
scenes.notes: MOTION_GRAPHICS — animated_inherent. FIX-M4 applied: 15km→15〜18km in overlay text.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 端島の空撮・俯瞰イメージ。島の全体形状（軍艦シルエット）が確認できる。東シナ海に浮かぶ孤立した建造物群。
scenes.visual_description_en: Aerial view of Hashima Island. Full island silhouette visible (battleship shape). Isolated structures in East China Sea.
scenes.notes: FIX-H1: aerial real photography strongly preferred. stock_search_required=true.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 30号棟の外観。9階建ての巨大コンクリート集合住宅。錆と苔。崩れかけた窓枠。壮大な廃墟感。
scenes.visual_description_en: Exterior of Building 30 (30-go-to). 9-story concrete apartment complex. Rust and moss. Crumbling window frames. Grand ruin.
scenes.notes: FIX-H1: real archival photo of Building 30 preferred. stock_search_required=true.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 廃墟の校舎内。倒れた机と椅子。黒板に消えかけたチョーク。光が差し込む教室。静かな喪失感。
scenes.visual_description_en: Interior of ruined school building. Overturned desks and chairs. Faded chalk on blackboard. Light penetrating the classroom. Quiet sense of loss.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 廃墟探索者視点のクローズアップ。コンクリートの割れ目から生える草。過去と自然の対話。ハイキョ文化のエステティック。
scenes.visual_description_en: Urban explorer close-up perspective. Grass growing through cracks in concrete. Dialogue between past and nature. Haikyo aesthetic.
scenes.notes: Stage 39 image assignment fix: IMG003 (wooden door/vines close-up) assigned as dual-use reuse. Crop to vines/concrete edge section — not door center. Motion slow_zoom_in differentiates from IMG003's static use in S003. 3-minute gap from primary S003 use. PROMPT_009 was never generated; no new image required.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 炭坑坑道の内部イメージ。木製の支柱が見える暗い通路。強制労働の記憶を示唆する空間。人物は絶対に描写しない。
scenes.visual_description_en: Interior of coal mine tunnel. Dark passage with wooden support beams visible. Space evoking the memory of forced labor. Absolutely no people depicted.
scenes.notes: FIX-H2a: Split from original S011 (4:10-5:00). S011a = 4:10-4:40 (30s). MANDATORY_HUMAN_REVIEW required (sensitive_content + AI_GENERATE, PROMPT_008). No people rule enforced.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 坑道の岩盤クローズアップ。コンクリートと岩の接触面。光源が見える。テクスチャー重視。人物なし。
scenes.visual_description_en: Extreme close-up of tunnel rock face. Contact surface of concrete and raw rock. Visible light source in distance. Texture-focused. No people.
scenes.notes: FIX-H2a: Second half of split S011. S011b = 4:40-5:00 (20s). Extreme close-up on geological texture for emotional contrast with preceding narration.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 強制労働関連の数字・データを示すモーショングラフィック。「日韓両国の記述が異なる」という事実をビジュアル化。数字は断定しない表現。
scenes.visual_description_en: Motion graphic showing disputed labor data. Visualizes the fact that Japanese and Korean records differ. Numbers expressed without assertion.
scenes.notes: MOTION_GRAPHICS. Content must not assign a specific number to forced labor deaths. Dual-source uncertainty must be visually communicated.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 島全体の廃墟景観。UNESCO世界遺産の標識が見える、または想起させるシンボル。世界遺産と歴史の矛盾を示唆する広角。
scenes.visual_description_en: Wide view of island ruins. UNESCO World Heritage symbol evoked or implied. Wide angle suggesting the tension between heritage designation and historical truth.

scenes.visual_description_ja: テキストオーバーレイ：「1974年1月15日」が暗い背景にフェードイン。テロップ演出。シンプルで重い。
scenes.visual_description_en: Text overlay: '1974年1月15日' fades in against dark background. Heavy and minimal.
scenes.notes: MOTION_GRAPHICS — text animation. Narration L018 reads the date simultaneously.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 閉山後の島。船着き場（廃墟）。かつての賑わいの対比として静けさを強調。閉山の喪失感を表現。
scenes.visual_description_en: Island after mine closure. Ruined pier. Stillness as contrast to former bustle. Expresses the loss of closure.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 廃棄された個人物品のクローズアップ：子どもの靴、古い写真（判別不可）、錆びた金属缶。急いで去った痕跡。
scenes.visual_description_en: Close-up of abandoned personal items: child's shoe, indistinct old photograph, rusted metal can. Evidence of hasty departure.
scenes.notes: No identifiable faces in any photographs depicted. People must be unidentifiable.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 廃墟の部屋。光の筋（光線）が塵埃とともに差し込む。光そのものが「動く」演出として機能。静止画でも動きを感じる構図。
scenes.visual_description_en: Ruined room interior. Light beams cutting through dust and debris. Light itself provides the motion. Composition that feels alive even as a still image.
scenes.notes: static: light beam movement replaces camera motion. The L022 [PAUSE:2s] falls within this scene.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 台風後の廃墟。崩れた壁、露出した鉄骨。35年間の侵食を感じさせる風化。青みがかった夜明け光。
scenes.visual_description_en: Post-typhoon ruins. Collapsed walls, exposed rebar. Weathering suggesting 35 years of erosion. Cool dawn light.

scenes.visual_description_ja: コンクリートのマクロテクスチャー。割れ目と苔と錆。ほぼ抽象的な構図。「静かに失われていく」ことを表現。[PAUSE:2s]×2がこのシーンに重なる。
scenes.visual_description_en: Macro concrete texture. Cracks, moss, rust. Near-abstract composition. Expresses 'slowly, quietly disappearing.' Two [PAUSE:2s] cues land on this scene.
scenes.notes: static: extreme macro — motion would break the abstract quality. L025, L026 both within this 30s scene. Stage 39 image assignment fix: IMG010 (coal/shale rock macro) assigned as dual-use reuse. Crop to moss/rust surface edges — not coal-black center. Apply warm color shift (+15°) to read as concrete/rust, not mine shaft. Motion static differentiates from IMG010's slow_zoom_in use in S011b. 3:30 minute gap from primary S011b use. PROMPT_016 was shared with S020/IMG016 (dusk island wide) — different image required for S019; no new image generated.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 夕暮れまたは夜明けの端島全景。UNESCO登録後の現在の姿。空と海と廃墟。静かで荘厳。超広角の極ゆっくりパン。
scenes.visual_description_en: Hashima Island at dusk or dawn. Current state after UNESCO inscription. Sky, sea, and ruins. Quiet and majestic. Extreme wide with very slow pan.
scenes.notes: FIX-H1: real photography essential for this contemplative ACT IV establishing shot. stock_search_required=true.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 世界遺産プレートの廃墟との対比。金属製プレートと錆びたコンクリート。誇りと忘却の共存。クローズアップ。
scenes.visual_description_en: Contrast of heritage plaque with surrounding ruins. Metal plate against rusted concrete. Pride and erasure coexisting. Close-up.
scenes.notes: L030 [PAUSE:2s] falls within this 40s scene before transition to S022 Ma beat.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 端島の静止した廃墟広角。波音と音楽のみ。ナレーションなし。完全な沈黙の40秒。「間（ま）」。
scenes.visual_description_en: Wide static shot of Hashima ruins. Ocean waves and music only. No narration. Complete 40 seconds of silence. Ma beat.
scenes.notes: FIX-H3: standardized to 40 seconds (timecode 10:20-11:00). Original description '10秒' was incorrect. is_ma_beat=true. narration_present=false enforced. motion_direction=static enforced per contract C03.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 観光客の船から見る端島のシルエット。船の舳先越しに廃墟を眺める視点。現在進行形の訪問者の視線。
scenes.visual_description_en: Hashima silhouette viewed from tourist ferry. POV over bow looking at ruins. Contemporary visitor's gaze.
scenes.notes: L031 is the B-ROLL cue label — no actual narration. L032 is the spoken OUTRO line.

scenes.visual_description_ja: 最終カット：端島の遠景、波が島を打つ。暗い空。島は変わらずそこにある。最後の問いと共にフェードアウト。
scenes.visual_description_en: Final shot: distant view of Hashima, waves beating the island. Dark sky. The island remains, unchanged. Fade out with the final question.
scenes.notes: FIX-H1: final shot real photography essential for emotional impact. stock_search_required=true. L035 [PAUSE:2s] and fade-out end the video.
